title: SCP Containment Labels Addon
description: A mod that adds SCP labels to the game
body:
This is a very simple mod I made to add the SCP labels to my SCP Containment mod. You can make the SCP labels and customize them to your liking. Or just use them for your own things

get the main SCP mod here: [https://modrinth.com/mod/the-scp-containment-mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-scp-containment-mod)

- main and only feature of the mod is that it adds SCP labels that you can customize to your liking.
